Artisan Bakery · Est. 1994

Baked before sunrise,
gone by noon.

A neighborhood hearth bakery: slow-fermented sourdough, hand-laminated pastry, and cakes built from scratch — every single day, no shortcuts.

Our Story

Thirty-one years, one starter.

In 1994, Marta Delgado carried her grandmother's rye starter across the Atlantic in an old jam jar. That same culture — fed by hand every morning, never frozen, never rushed — still leavens every loaf that leaves our hearth today.

What began as one wood-fired oven behind a rented storefront has grown into a full bakery and coffee counter, now run by Marta's daughter, Elena. The method hasn't changed: long cold ferments, hand-shaped loaves, and a bake that starts hours before the doors open.

1994First loaf out
of the oven
1Mother starter,
fed daily
3rd genElena now runs
the ovens

The Counter

What's in the case today

Everything is baked in-house in small batches. The photos below are looping clips of the actual bakes — no filters, just steam.

$6.50
Bread

Rustic Sourdough Boule

Our everyday loaf: a 24-hour cold ferment, a blistered crust, and a chewy, open crumb. Best the same day, toasts beautifully after.

$7.25
Bread

Hearth Country Loaf

A heavier whole-wheat blend baked directly on the oven floor. Deep crust, nutty crumb, cut to order at the counter.

$4.25
Bread

Golden Baguette

Thin, crackling crust and an airy interior. Shaped twice a day so there's almost always one still warm.

$5.75
Cakes · per slice

Honey Walnut Napoleon

Dozens of paper-thin pastry layers, soaked in wildflower honey, stacked with spiced walnut cream.

$6.25
Cakes · per slice

Wild Berry Cream Cake

Light sponge, whipped mascarpone cream, and a heap of seasonal berries, assembled fresh each morning.

$6.75
Cakes · per slice

Dark Chocolate Ganache Cake

Rich cocoa sponge under a mirror-glossy ganache. Dense, dark, and not too sweet.

$4.50
Beverages

Iced Caramel Cold Brew

Slow-steeped cold brew over ice with a thread of house caramel. Bracingly smooth.

$3.75
Beverages

Classic Cappuccino

Double espresso, steamed milk, a half-inch of microfoam. Poured to order at the counter.
